title: WordPress 2.5
body: We've already upgraded to [WordPress 2.5](http://wordpress.org/development/2008/03/wordpress-25-brecker/), and I've also upgraded my other blogs to this new version without any issues. So far, the improvements I’ve noticed that I’m most pleased with are the new, much more user-friendly admin interface and the fact that plugins can be updated automatically without using FTP. We’ll keep you posted.
